title: Templating Engines Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of dynamic HTML generation, popular engines (EJS/Pug), and res.render() for combined data and templates in Express.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the primarily role of a 'Templating Engine' in an Express.js application?
options: To combine HTML templates with dynamic data (like a user's name or product list) from the server to generate final HTML pages.
To hide the JavaScript code from the console.

questions.question: Which popular templating engine uses standard HTML with embedded JavaScript tags (e.g., <%= user.name %>)?
Which Express method is used in a professional project to render a template and send the final HTML to the user?
Which line of code is commonly used in Express to set the 'view engine' to EJS?
Does using a templating engine allow you to build truly Fullstack applications by providing a way to generate dynamic, user-specific views?
options: Yes, as it is a core feature of any modern server-side framework.
